schemas.name: SightingEnvironmentProvenance
schemas.description: One field-level provenance entry: which value column was produced by which upstream provider id.

fields.name: field
fields.description: Value column the provenance applies to (e.g. 'chl_a_mg_m3_day', 'fishing_hours_day_25km').

fields.name: source
fields.description: Provider id that produced the value (e.g. 'erddap', 'gfw').

schemas.name: SightingEnvironmentEntry
schemas.description: One sighting with its ocean + fishing-effort enrichment columns. Position is denormalized to lon/lat so the frontend doesn't have to re-parse location_begin.

fields.name: lon
fields.description: Longitude (WGS84). Parsed from location_begin JSON server-side.

fields.name: lat
fields.description: Latitude (WGS84). Parsed from location_begin JSON server-side.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Sighting date as stored (YYYY-MM-DD or similar).

fields.name: chl_a_mg_m3_day
fields.description: Surface chlorophyll-a (mg/m³), day mean. NULL = lookup pending or no data.

fields.name: current_region_mean_speed_m_s_day
fields.description: Day-mean current speed (m/s) averaged over the regional patch around the sighting, from CMEMS. NULL when no CMEMS patch was fetched.

fields.name: current_region_max_speed_m_s_day
fields.description: Day-mean of the cell-wise max current speed (m/s) inside the regional patch, from CMEMS.

fields.name: current_curl_s_inv_day
fields.description: Vertical vorticity (curl = dv/dx - du/dy) in 1/s at the sighting position, derived from the regional CMEMS u/v patch. Positive = cyclonic in northern hemisphere; magnitude flags eddy activity.

fields.name: current_divergence_s_inv_day
fields.description: Horizontal divergence (du/dx + dv/dy) in 1/s at the sighting position, derived from the regional CMEMS u/v patch. Negative = convergence (front).

fields.name: provenance
fields.description: Per-column provenance, serialized from the SightingExtended.provenance + SightingFishingEffort.provenance JSON maps.

fields.name: air_temperature_c_day
fields.description: 2 m air temperature, day mean (°C). From WeatherService / Open-Meteo.

fields.name: uv_index_day
fields.description: UV index, day peak (around solar noon).

schemas.name: SightingEnvironmentListResponse
schemas.description: Response of /json/sightings/environment/list — paginated sighting list with ocean + fishing enrichment columns merged in.

schemas.name: SightingCurrentRegionRequest
schemas.description: Request: which sighting's regional CMEMS u/v patch to load.

fields.name: sighting_id
fields.description: DB id of the sighting whose regional currents patch should be returned.

schemas.name: SightingCurrentRegionEntry
schemas.description: Per-sighting regional CMEMS u/v patch: bbox + grid metadata + JSON-encoded {grid_lat[], grid_lon[], u[][], v[][]} payload.

fields.name: grid_json
fields.description: JSON-encoded {grid_lat: number[], grid_lon: number[], u: (number|null)[][], v: (number|null)[][]}. Encoded as a string in the wire format because vts does not currently support 2D arrays; payload is small (~1-2 KB at 9x9).

fields.name: valid_at
fields.description: Upstream timestamp the patch represents (ISO 8601, UTC).

fields.name: fetched_at
fields.description: When the patch was pulled from CMEMS (ISO 8601, UTC).

schemas.name: SightingCurrentRegionResponse
schemas.description: Response: the regional CMEMS u/v patch for a single sighting; entry is null when no patch has been fetched yet.

fields.name: entry
fields.description: The regional patch — absent when no patch has been fetched yet for the sighting.
